body.title: Archive python_diagnostic_base_class and ClaudeAndAkien GitHub repos
body.result: archived python_diagnostic_base_class and ClaudeAndAkien on GitHub; removed local clones
body.description:
Three repos are no longer the canonical home for their work and should be archived: python_diagnostic_base_class (micro-package superseded by UU), ClaudeAndAkien (agentic framework extracted into UU). agent_datacenter does not appear in the GitHub repo list — likely already renamed to UnseenUniversity. Validate no live imports before archiving.

**Affected files:** None in UU codebase; local clones at ~/dev/src/ClaudeAndAkien and ~/dev/src/python_diagnostic_base_class
**Design rules:** none
**Scope boundary:** IN — validate no live imports from these repos; archive on GitHub (not delete — preserve history); remove or archive local dev clones; OUT — do NOT touch ~/TheIgors local install (separate T-theigors-to-uu-migration ticket handles that)
**Test plan:** Igor and superclaude start cleanly after local clones removed; GitHub shows repos archived; grep -rn 'from ClaudeAndAkien\|import ClaudeAndAkien\|python_diagnostic_base_class' devices/ lab/ returns 0 hits
